fields.rationale: Microsoft-heavy estate, existing Azure landing zone, and Purview governance made in-tenant Azure services the lowest-risk path; the fraud model itself stays framework-agnostic (Python, ONNX-exportable).
fields.alternatives: AWS SageMaker stack (rejected: no landing zone, duplicate governance); self-hosted open-source LLM (deferred: ops burden before MLOps maturity exists).
fields.risks: Azure OpenAI quota constraints at national scale; single-cloud concentration; mitigations: PTU reservation and ONNX portability of the core model.
